content:
hello everybody!!
i have a problem. . . Today, I bought 980 donation currency to spend on a banner. Unfortunately, I accidentally converted everything into cores out of habit. I haven't spent anything yet, and I'm not touching anything, but now I don't have donation currency. Is there any way to convert cores back into donation currency? :::(

I deleted the game about 20 minutes ago to free up space and then redownloaded it. I tried to get into my Apple account that it is tied to and now it’s giving me this message.

I’ve been playing since October ish and I’ve made purchases on the account. Any ideas?
thread_title: “This account is banned from logging in”
